THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUEY, SYLVIA AMES, ILLA GORDON, LESTER (SUED AS CHARLES GORDON) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 14 GARRISON AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134 $1,918.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,918.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, DEF TO PAY $1918 BY 4/30,$959 RENT FOR APR,MAY & JUN($479.50 ON 3RD & 17TH); IF DEFAULT, S/E MAY BE LIFTED. IF DEF UNABLE TO FIND HOUSING TO VAC BY 6/30, S/E MAY BE EXTENDED TO 7/31 IF DEF SENDS WRITTEN NOTICE TO PLTF BY 6/15 & PAY $959 JULY RENT($479.50 ON 3RD & 17TH); EBOC; SEE JDGMT FOR OTHER CONDS
